nodes.name: Webhook: Git Repair Request
nodes.notes: Trigger git repair. POST { mode: 'dry-run' | 'apply', roots: ['/Volumes/ARCHIVE1', ...], device: 'GOD' }

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
=:warning: *GIT REPAIR — APPROVAL REQUIRED*

Mode: `apply` (will modify repos)
Device: {{$json.device}}
Roots: {{$json.roots.join(', ')}}
Command: `{{$json.command}}`

Backups will be created before any repair.

Reply :white_check_mark: to approve or :x: to cancel.

nodes.name: HTTP: Slack Approval Request
nodes.notes: Posts approval request to Slack before running --apply mode. Manual approval required.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: ={{JSON.stringify([{role: 'system', content: 'You are GABRIEL. A git repair scan is about to run. Acknowledge it briefly and musically.'}, {role: 'user', content: 'Git repair ' + $json.mode + ' mode on ' + $json.device + '. Scanning: ' + $json.roots.join(', ')}])}}

nodes.name: HTTP: Gabriel Acknowledges
nodes.notes: Gabriel acknowledges the dry-run scan. Non-blocking.
